goal: Capture a 30-second 1080p viewport clip of the pick demo for a trade-show loop.
thoughts: RTX Real-Time, not path-traced -- 30s of path-traced takes hours and trade-show screens don't resolve the difference. record_demo_video captures the viewport camera cleanly, not the desktop, so no OBS rabbit-hole. Start sim before recording so the pick is actually running in frame.
code:
set_render_mode(mode="RTXInteractiveRealTime")
set_render_resolution(width=1920, height=1080)
sim_control(action="play")
record_demo_video(
    output_path="<OUT_MP4>",
    duration_seconds=30,
    camera_path="/World/Cameras/Hero_Beauty",
    fps=30,
    include_ui=False
)
failure_modes: Recommending path-traced mode for a 30-second real-time capture
Sending her to OBS/ffmpeg for built-in functionality
Starting capture before sim_control play so the robot is frozen in the clip
